slides.title: Switch academies at any time
slides.body: Move between Python, SQL, Web and Java while keeping one developer profile.

slides.title: Follow the course map
slides.body: Each academy contains modules, lessons, projects, assessments and credentials.

slides.title: Use learning intelligence
slides.body: Diagnostics, adaptive coaching, mastery maps and smart review target weak areas.

slides.title: Build real things
slides.body: Projects, coding labs, missions and team work create practical evidence.

slides.title: Create professional proof
slides.body: Your academy-aware portfolio records credentials, projects and mission dossiers.

slides.title: Ask the AI mentor
slides.body: Use Socratic tutoring, debugging, review and interview practice when stuck.
